title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow, you got so many! You're amazing!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'll take good care of them forever and ever!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, Big Brother? Thank you. You've made me
super happy!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, Big Sister? Thank you. You've made me
super happy!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I hope I can make you feel the same way
someday.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I hope I can make you feel the same way
someday.
